items.title: Socialists battle to hold Paris as France holds mayoral elections
items.deck: The capital could shift to the right after 25 years under the Socialists if Rachida Dati defeats Emmanuel Grégoire.

items.title: Rival clubs should rally behind Rangers' call for a sitdown to sort out Scotland's rank rotten refereeing
items.deck: For long enough now, finding lasting peace in the Middle East has often seemed easier than getting the big nobs of Scottish football to make some proper decisions for the greater good.
